texto: That Muhammad could predict certain events does not prove that he was a prophet: he may have been able to guess successfully, but this does not mean that he had real knowledge of the future. And certainly the fact that he was able to recount events from the past does not prove that he was a prophet, because he could have read about those events in the Bible and, if he was illiterate, he could still have had the Bible read to him.
explicacao: Citação de Muhammad al Warraq sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “That Muhammad could predict certain events does not prove that he was a prophet: he may have been…” articula sabedoria, islam, muhammad em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como muhammad e prediction.
